app.tagline: Money you understand. Wealth that compounds.

nav.babylonRuleBody: Save at least 10% of every paycheck before any other expense.

hero.subtitle: Arka Finance is a calm, modern dashboard that turns everyday spending into lasting savings. Plan budgets, set goals, and follow the 10% rule from Arkad — all in one place.

features.headline: Manage your money without the anxiety
features.subtitle: Arka wraps the spreadsheet-level control of YNAB with the simplicity of a modern fintech app — and adds a philosophy that's lasted 8,000 years.

income.title: Income & expenses
income.description: Log every inflow and outflow with categories, fixed vs variable types, and rich notes.

dashboard.title: Visual dashboard
dashboard.description: Clean, calm charts: cashflow trend, spending by category, savings momentum — all at a glance.

goals.title: Goals & budgets
goals.description: Plan monthly budgets per category and set financial goals with automatic monthly targets.

babylon.title: Babylon 10% rule
babylon.description: Arkad's core principle baked in: Arka tells you how much to save this month, every month.

insights.title: Automatic insights
insights.description: Personalised nudges: category overshoots, subscription creep, savings opportunities.

subscriptions.title: Subscription radar
subscriptions.description: Detects recurring charges automatically and shows the total you pay every month and year.

health.title: Financial health score
health.description: A single 0–100 score that reflects your savings rate, spending habits and goal progress.

secure.title: Secure by default
secure.description: Firebase Auth with Google, GitHub and email — strict Firestore rules isolate your data.

philosophy.headline: Babylon's seven rules, built into the product.
philosophy.bodySuffix: , Arkad shares seven simple rules for a life of wealth. Arka Finance turns those rules into gentle daily nudges — so the philosophy becomes a habit.
philosophy.quote: A part of all you earn is yours to keep. Not less than a tenth, no matter how little you earn.
philosophy.quoteAuthor: — Arkad, The Richest Man in Babylon

l1.title: Pay yourself first
l1.detail: Save at least one tenth of every income before any expense.

l2.title: Control your expenses
l2.detail: Live within a budget calibrated to the life you want.

l3.title: Make your gold multiply
l3.detail: Put savings to work through deliberate investing.

l4.title: Guard your treasure
l4.detail: Protect your money against loss and avoid schemes.

l5.title: Own your home
l5.detail: Direct a portion toward assets that build equity.

l6.title: Plan future income
l6.detail: Prepare for old age and the protection of loved ones.

l7.title: Increase earning power
l7.detail: Keep learning — skill compounds faster than capital.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to Arka Finance ("Arka", "we", "us"). These terms govern your use of the Arka web app at arka-finance-app.vercel.app. By creating an account or using the app, you agree to them. If you disagree, please don't use Arka.

sections.heading: 1. Beta status
sections.body: Arka is currently in beta. Features may change, break, or be removed without notice. We do our best to avoid data loss, but during beta we cannot guarantee it. Please keep your own records for anything critical.

sections.heading: 2. Your account
sections.body: You must provide a valid email and a password, or sign in with a supported provider (Google). You're responsible for keeping your credentials safe and for all activity under your account. Notify us if you suspect unauthorised access.

sections.heading: 3. Acceptable use
sections.body: Don't try to break Arka, abuse its infrastructure, scrape data, reverse-engineer it, upload malicious content, impersonate others, or use it to commit fraud or anything illegal. Automated access or botting is not allowed.

sections.heading: 4. Your data belongs to you
sections.body: All financial information you enter (incomes, expenses, budgets, goals, subscriptions) is yours. You can export it or delete your account at any time from Settings. We don't sell your data.

sections.heading: 5. Not financial advice
sections.body: Arka is a personal budgeting and literacy tool. Nothing inside the app is financial, legal, tax, or investment advice. Always consult a qualified professional before making material decisions with your money.

sections.heading: 6. Availability
sections.body: Arka runs on third-party cloud services (Firebase, Vercel). The service is provided "as is" and may be unavailable, slow, or inconsistent at times. We do not promise specific uptime during beta.

sections.heading: 7. Disclaimer and liability
sections.body: To the fullest extent allowed by law, Arka is provided without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential losses arising from your use of the service.

sections.heading: 8. Termination and changes
sections.body: You can delete your account at any time. We may suspend accounts that violate these terms. We may also update these terms; the "Last updated" date will reflect it. Continued use after a change means you accept the new version.

terms.contact: Questions about these terms? Email jcrodriguezc0728@hotmail.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains what data Arka Finance collects, how it's used, and the controls you have over it. Arka is an indie personal finance app built and maintained by its author. Contact: jcrodriguezc0728@hotmail.com.

sections.heading: 1. Data we collect
sections.body: Account info (email, display name, optional photo from Google sign-in). Preferences (theme, language, display currency). Financial data you enter manually: incomes, expenses, budgets, goals and subscriptions. We do not sync your bank account, do not scrape, and do not use tracking pixels.

sections.heading: 2. How we use it
sections.body: To run the app, render your dashboards, keep your state synced across devices, and improve Arka. We never sell your data and we don't share it for advertising.

sections.heading: 3. Where it's stored
sections.body: Your data lives in Google Cloud Firestore (Firebase), associated with your account UID. Firestore security rules enforce strict per-user isolation: no other user can read or modify your records.

sections.heading: 4. Third parties we rely on
sections.body: Firebase Authentication and Firestore (Google) for identity and storage. Firebase App Check with reCAPTCHA v3 (Google) to block abuse. An FX rate API for currency conversion (no personal data is sent). Vercel for hosting. These providers handle data on our behalf under their own terms.

sections.heading: 5. Cookies and local storage
sections.body: We use cookies to remember your preferences (theme, language, cookie consent) and authentication state. We use localStorage to keep an offline-first snapshot of your app state so Arka loads instantly. No third-party advertising or analytics cookies.

sections.heading: 6. Your rights
sections.body: You can view, edit, export, and delete your data directly in Settings. Under GDPR and similar frameworks you also have the right to object, restrict processing, or lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority. Contact us to exercise any of these.

sections.heading: 7. Retention and deletion
sections.body: We retain your data while your account is active. When you clear local data or delete your account, the corresponding records are removed from Firestore. Backups kept by Google Cloud may persist for a short rolling window before being purged.

sections.heading: 8. Children and changes
sections.body: Arka is not intended for users under 16. We may update this policy; the "Last updated" date reflects changes. If the change is material we will make reasonable effort to notify you.

privacy.contact: Privacy questions or requests? Email jcrodriguezc0728@hotmail.com.

welcome.title: Welcome to Arka Finance
welcome.body: This dashboard helps you understand and control your finances. We'll take a quick tour — you can skip anytime.

balance.title: Your net balance
balance.body: This card shows your current financial balance — everything you've earned minus everything you've spent.

income.title: Income this month
income.body: Here you can track how much money is coming in this month and compare it with the previous month.

expenses.title: Expenses this month
expenses.body: This shows your spending for the current period. A downward trend is good here — less is more.

charts.title: Charts and cashflow
charts.body: These charts help you visualise your financial behaviour: how income and expenses evolve over the last six months.

score.title: Financial health score
score.body: This score reflects your financial stability based on savings rate, spend-to-income ratio, budget adherence and goal progress.

quickAdd.title: Quick actions
quickAdd.body: Use this button to quickly add an income or expense without leaving the dashboard. You can also press Ctrl+K.

insights.title: Arka insights
insights.body: Here you receive personalised recommendations to improve your finances — watch this panel for alerts and tips.

done.title: You're all set
done.body: You're ready to start managing your finances. You can replay any part of the tour from Settings → Help.

incomePage.title: Income section
incomePage.body: This is where every bit of money coming in lives: salary, freelance, dividends, one-offs. Each row is one entry.

incomeAdd.title: Log a new income
incomeAdd.body: Click here to record a new income. Pick a category, amount and whether it repeats. Arka converts it to your display currency automatically.

incomeTable.title: Your income history
incomeTable.body: Every entry appears here sorted by date. You can edit or delete any row from the Actions column.

expensesPage.title: Expenses section
expensesPage.body: All your outflows, categorised. Knowing where the money leaves is the first law of wealth — awareness.

expensesAdd.title: Log a new expense
expensesAdd.body: Record a purchase — amount, category, whether it's fixed or variable. The more you log, the sharper Arka's insights get.

expensesTable.title: Transactions and filters
expensesTable.body: Search by description, filter by category or type. The table updates in real time — useful for reviewing a specific month or finding that one forgotten subscription.

budgetsPage.title: Budgets section
budgetsPage.body: Set a monthly, weekly or yearly cap per category. Arka tracks how close you are and warns you before you go over.

budgetsAdd.title: Create a budget
budgetsAdd.body: Pick a category and a limit. Over the month you'll see a progress bar filling up as you spend in that category.

budgetsGrid.title: Active budgets
budgetsGrid.body: Each card shows one budget with its usage. Green means healthy, amber means approaching the limit, red means overshoot.

goalsPage.title: Goals section
goalsPage.body: Long-term savings targets — a trip, a fund, an emergency cushion. Arka calculates how much you need to save each month to hit the deadline.

goalsAdd.title: Create a goal
goalsAdd.body: Name the goal, set a target amount and a deadline. Update the current amount as you save towards it.

goalsGrid.title: Goal tracker
goalsGrid.body: Each card shows progress, monthly contribution needed and months remaining. Celebrate when one hits 100%.

subscriptionsPage.title: Subscriptions section
subscriptionsPage.body: The silent budget killers. Arka surfaces them so you can see the full monthly and yearly bill of every recurring service.

subscriptionsAdd.title: Add a subscription
subscriptionsAdd.body: Record services you pay periodically — streaming, gym, software. Pick a billing cycle and Arka normalises to a monthly equivalent.

subscriptionsTable.title: Your subscriptions
subscriptionsTable.body: All active subscriptions listed with their billing cycle, amount and monthly equivalent — so you can spot what's worth keeping.

insightsFull.title: Full insights
insightsFull.body: This page goes deeper than the dashboard widget: every insight Arka generates, your health score broken down, and your top spending categories.

insightsAll.title: All insights
insightsAll.body: Warnings, praises and tips. Each is based on your actual data — savings rate, budget adherence, irregular expenses, and more.

reportsPage.title: Reports section
reportsPage.body: Six-month view of your finances plus exports. Use the buttons at the top to download CSV summaries of income, expenses or a full report.

reportsTable.title: Monthly breakdown
reportsTable.body: Row by row view of income, expenses, net and savings rate for each of the last six months. Great for spotting trends.

settingsProfile.title: Profile
settingsProfile.body: Your display name and expected monthly income. The income helps Arka benchmark your savings rate against the Babylonian 10% rule.

settingsCurrency.title: Display currency
settingsCurrency.body: Choose how amounts are displayed. Data is always stored in USD and converted live — so switching currency doesn't destroy your history.

settingsAppearance.title: Appearance
settingsAppearance.body: Dark mode or follow your system theme. Your choice is saved on your account and follows you across devices.

settingsLanguage.title: Language
settingsLanguage.body: English, Spanish or French. The interface switches instantly and your choice is remembered.

settingsHelp.title: Help and tutorial
settingsHelp.body: You'll always find the tour here. Replay the full walkthrough or jump into a single section any time you need a refresher.

settings.title: Help & tutorial
settings.description: Relaunch the interactive walkthrough at any time.
